text:
[
  {
    "thinking": "The video starts with a black screen displaying instructions for the user to share their screen. A small video feed of the participant is visible in the top right corner. This is the initial state of the recording.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 0,
    "time_end_ms": 0,
    "description": "Initial screen showing instructions to share the window.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "frame_description": "A black screen with white text instructions and a small video feed of the participant in the top right corner."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "Text begins to appear on the screen, providing the user with their task instructions. This appears to be an automated reveal of text rather than user input, as it is perfectly timed and formatted.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 1050,
    "time_end_ms": 28450,
    "description": "First block of task instructions is revealed on screen.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "frame_description": "The screen displays the first part of the task instructions: 'Perfect! Here's your task: Now I'm going to show you a prototype with new filtering features...'"
  },
  {
    "thinking": "A second block of text is revealed, continuing the instructions for the user after the first block disappears.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 29200,
    "time_end_ms": 37150,
    "description": "Second block of task instructions is revealed on screen.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "frame_description": "The screen displays the second part of the task instructions: 'Please think aloud as you work through this, sharing your thoughts and describing what you're seeing as you go...'"
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The final block of instructions is revealed, telling the user how to open the website prototype.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 37850,
    "time_end_ms": 42650,
    "description": "Final block of task instructions is revealed on screen.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "frame_description": "The screen displays the final part of the task instructions: 'I'm going to open the website in your browser now. If you don't see the website, click the button below to open it.'"
  },
  {
    "thinking": "An 'Open' button appears in the center of the screen as instructed by the preceding text.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 44150,
    "time_end_ms": 44150,
    "description": "'Open' button appears in the center of the screen.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "frame_description": "A grey 'Open' button with an external link icon appears in the center of the black screen."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The text 'Go ahead' appears above the button, prompting the user to proceed with the task.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 45350,
    "time_end_ms": 45800,
    "description": "'Go ahead' text appears on screen.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "frame_description": "The words 'Go ahead' appear in white text above the 'Open' button."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user moves the cursor to the 'Open' button and clicks it to launch the prototype.",
    "type": "click",
    "time_start_ms": 46100,
    "time_end_ms": 46100,
    "description": "User clicks the 'Open' button.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "interaction_target": "Open",
    "frame_description": "The cursor is positioned over the 'Open' button at the moment of the click.",
    "cursor_x": 960,
    "cursor_y": 445
  },
  {
    "thinking": "After clicking the button, the screen transitions through a white state to load the application interface. This is a navigation event triggered by the user's click.",
    "type": "navigate",
    "time_start_ms": 46150,
    "time_end_ms": 47750,
    "description": "Screen transitions and loads the 'Explore' page of the application.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "page_title": "Explore",
    "frame_description": "The screen transitions from white to the 'Explore' page of the mobile application prototype."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user begins to scroll down the list of available tasks and sessions in the 'Explore' section of the app to see what is available.",
    "type": "scroll",
    "time_start_ms": 48500,
    "time_end_ms": 58350,
    "description": "User scrolls down the list of tasks to explore available options.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "frame_description": "The user is scrolling vertically through a list of task cards like 'Video Call', 'In Person', and 'Diary Study'."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user scrolls back up to the top of the list, reviewing the tasks again before making a selection.",
    "type": "scroll",
    "time_start_ms": 58850,
    "time_end_ms": 77593,
    "description": "User scrolls back up the list of tasks.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "frame_description": "The user scrolls back up to the top of the 'Explore' page, passing the 'Short tasks & surveys' section."
  }
]
